compiled_state.title: SC4 gap: sprint Phase 7 implementation_gap routing does not invoke implementation-plan in epic-direct mode
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Problem
Epic SC4 and story 1826-b0ee DD2 require that implementation_gap failures at epic validation route to '/dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode to create new tasks.' Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 sets ROUTING: implementation-plan in the gap-classification signal but then falls through to 'existing Phase 7 remediation flow (Step 1)' which creates bug tasks directly via '.claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug' — not by invoking /dso:implementation-plan.

The routing label and the actual orchestrator action are inconsistent.

## Fix Options
Either:
(a) Update Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 to explicitly invoke /dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode when ROUTING: implementation-plan is received for implementation_gap SCs, OR
(b) Revise the SC4/DD language to clarify that 'ROUTING: implementation-plan' means bug-task creation (matching the current actual behavior)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 implementation_gap path is consistent with SC4 (either invoke /dso:implementation-plan in epic-direct mode OR revise SC4 to match actual behavior)
- [ ] Completion-verifier passes for epic f997-ed78 with PASS on SC4
- [ ] tests/skills/test_sprint_gap_classification.py covers the corrected routing path

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — Gap Classification Step in Phase 7 at line ~1349, contract at gap-classification-output.md, tests at test_sprint_gap_classification.py. The routing line says 'Proceed with the existing Phase 7 remediation flow (Step 1 below)' but the contract's routing description says 'implementation-plan' suggesting invocation of the skill. Need to clarify in SKILL.md that ROUTING: implementation-plan means bug-task creation via Phase 7 Step 1, not invocation of /dso:implementation-plan skill. Test file needs a new test asserting the corrected routing.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Modified 3 files: SKILL.md routing rule clarified, gap-classification-output.md contract updated with implementation_gap routing clarification, test file updated with new test asserting corrected routing.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 7/7 pytest tests passed, replan safety tests 4/4, shim-refs clean, portability clean.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — SC4 gap resolved. SKILL.md implementation_gap routing rule now explicitly states it proceeds to Step 1 (bug-task creation) and that ROUTING: implementation-plan is a signal label, not a /dso:implementation-plan skill invocation. gap-classification-output.md updated with equivalent clarification. New test added asserting both properties.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: SKILL.md Phase 7 and gap-classification-output.md clarified. SC4 epic text updated via b1f3-cb60. Epic completion-verifier PASS confirms SC4 is satisfied.
comments.author: Test
